channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Property Listings
channel.description: Live Zimbabwe property listings with branded hybrid cards — photo on top, price and specs on the brand strip. One item per active listing for the Mutapa Times properties autolist.

item.title: USD 115,000 — 4 Bedroomed house For Sale In Zimre Park (Zimre Park, Harare East)
item.description: USD 115,000 — Zimre Park, Harare East. 4 beds, 2 baths. 4 Bedroomed house For Sale In Zimre Park. Browse all listings at mutapatimes.com/property #Zimbabwe #Property #ZimbabweProperty #RealEstate #ZimbabweNews
